title: Federation Index (federation-index v1.0)
description: Cross-Repo Knowledge Layer configuration linking multiple Lenskit bundles.

federation_id.description: Unique identifier for this federation (e.g., project name).

bundles.description: List of bundles participating in this federation.

repo_id.description: Unique identity namespace for this repository within the federation.

bundle_path.description: Path or URI to the root of the repository bundle (containing bundle.json).

last_fingerprint.description: The canonical_dump_index_sha256 or manifest run_id of the bundle, used for staleness detection.

tags.description: Optional roles or classification tags for this bundle in the federation.

cross_repo_links.description: Optional predefined navigation edges between repos.
